list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: update environment configuration and enhance README for Docker Compose setup
- Add .env.example files for development and production environments - Update .gitignore to include additional environment files - Expand README with quick start guide and deployment instructions

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "New/updated database configurations found", "Notification.DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "setup-infrastructure", "git.auto.fetch.suggestion.counter": "2", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/documentation/01-project-setup", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "npm.test.executor": "Run", "prettierjs.PrettierConfiguration.Package": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/frontend/node_modules/prettier", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "ts.external.directory.path": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/frontend/node_modules/typescript/lib", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: feat: add OpenAPI client generation and health check endpoints
chore: rename CI jobs for clarity and update workspace configuration

feat: add Docker Compose infrastructure for Zitadel IdP setup
- Create docker-compose.yml with Traefik, PostgreSQL, and Zitadel services - Traefik configured for reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS challenge) - PostgreSQL with named volume for persistent data storage - Zitadel with initial organization and superadmin account setup - gRPC passthrough configuration for Zitadel API compatibility - .env.example for all required configuration variables - .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment files - Comprehensive README with setup, deployment, and troubleshooting guides
This implements the VPS infrastructure foundation for authentication. OIDC application configuration will be handled in a subsequent ticket.

MESSAGE.value: feat: add OpenAPI client generation and health check endpoints
chore: rename CI jobs for clarity and update workspace configuration

feat: add Docker Compose infrastructure for Zitadel IdP setup
- Create docker-compose.yml with Traefik, PostgreSQL, and Zitadel services - Traefik configured for reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS challenge) - PostgreSQL with named volume for persistent data storage - Zitadel with initial organization and superadmin account setup - gRPC passthrough configuration for Zitadel API compatibility - .env.example for all required configuration variables - .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment files - Comprehensive README with setup, deployment, and troubleshooting guides
This implements the VPS infrastructure foundation for authentication. OIDC application configuration will be handled in a subsequent ticket.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: add Docker Compose infrastructure for Zitadel IdP setup
- Create docker-compose.yml with Traefik, PostgreSQL, and Zitadel services - Traefik configured for reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS challenge) - PostgreSQL with named volume for persistent data storage - Zitadel with initial organization and superadmin account setup - gRPC passthrough configuration for Zitadel API compatibility - .env.example for all required configuration variables - .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment files - Comprehensive README with setup, deployment, and troubleshooting guides
This implements the VPS infrastructure foundation for authentication. OIDC application configuration will be handled in a subsequent ticket.
